category_title: Young children with anxiety exhibiting externalizing 'Fight' behaviors
scenario_title: Group play session with shared constructive materials
minimal_context: The student is participating in a group play session to build a plastic track for a motor car.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's build a track together using these plastic pieces so the motor car can move.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sings in a high-pitched, changed voice) I get to build it! Give me all the pieces right now!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to share the pieces to build the track.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, you're messing it up! It's your fault the car won't go!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just keep trying to put the track together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Throws a plastic track piece) You are stupid! I am controlling the car, not you!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's build a track together using these plastic pieces so the motor car can move.

STUDENT: (Sings in a high-pitched, changed voice) I get to build it! Give me all the pieces right now!

TUTOR: We need to share the pieces to build the track.

STUDENT: No, you're messing it up! It's your fault the car won't go!

TUTOR: Let's just keep trying to put the track together.

STUDENT: (Throws a plastic track piece) You are stupid! I am controlling the car, not you!

task.content: Group play sessions involving shared materials like marble runs or train tracks, such as unstructured constructive play with a set of plastic tracks with a motor car that could move
task.learning_goal: facilitate positive interactions among the children and to facilitate effective problem-solving and/or emotional regulation skills

context.materials: shared materials like marble runs or train tracks, plastic tracks with a motor car that could move, visual expectations, visual attendance chart with stickers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During group play when social conflicts or negative interactions occur
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Crossed the boundaries. Irritable, offended. Using mean words. Blaming. Throwing. Demanding, controlling.
